name: Potato Bread with Sour Cream #t Chives
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all the ingredients into the pan in the order listed.
2. Select white bread and press "Start".
3. This bread tastes just as delicious as it sounds. Savor it with a steak dinner, fill with homemade beef pate for finger sandwiches, or toast the slices, dust with garlic salt, and slather with butter.
